Container.Name: opencode
Container.Overview: OpenCode AI coding agent in headless server mode with OpenSSH and persistent appdata. Bundles Bun, the Chisl control-plane plugin, and AIONCORE_URL / AIONCORE_TOKEN template vars for dial-back to your local Chisl/AionCore instance (port 64921). SSH in for the TUI or opencode auth login; API on port 4096.

Config.Name: SSH Port
Config.Description: Inbound SSH access to the container (ssh root@SERVER -p 2222)

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent storage for ALL OpenCode data: settings (.config/opencode), auth + sessions + history (.local/share/opencode), cache, SSH host keys, and a workspace folder

Config.Name: Root Password (SSH)
Config.Description: Password for SSH root login. Required for SSH access.

Config.Name: OpenCode API Password
Config.Description: Optional HTTP basic-auth password for the OpenCode server API (username: opencode). Leave empty on a trusted LAN.

Config.Name: Chisl AionCore URL
Config.Description: Chisl plugin dial-back URL (from Install Plugin in AionUi). No /plugin suffix. Example: http://192.168.0.68:64921/

Config.Name: Chisl AionCore Token
Config.Description: Chisl plugin bearer token (from Install Plugin in AionUi). Required for plugin connection.

Config.Name: Chisl Shell Debug
Config.Description: Optional. Set to 1 to enable verbose Chisl run_shell_streaming debug logs in OpenCode.

Config.Name: OpenCode Port (internal)
Config.Description: Internal port OpenCode listens on. Keep in sync with the port mapping above.

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: Optional. You can instead SSH in and run `opencode auth login` once — credentials persist in appdata.
